name: Wolfspeed, Inc.
description: Wolfspeed, Inc. is an innovator of wide bandgap semiconductors, focusing on silicon carbide and gallium nitride materials and devices for power and radio frequency applications. The company's product families include silicon carbide materials, power-switching devices, and RF devices targeted for applications such as electric vehicles, fast charging, 5G, renewable energy and storage, and military and aerospace. Wolfspeed was formerly known as Cree, Inc. and changed its name to Wolfspeed, Inc. in October 2021.
